channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title: Wanted a truly local storage for my tweets so built birdclaw. Imoorts your archive, backs it up on g...
item.description:
Wanted a truly local storage for my tweets so built birdclaw. Imoorts your archive, backs it up on github, has jobs so you can import your x bookmarks daily (since they are not fully accessible via the api). https://t.co/4Nd1Ad0ZeY
--- @steipete | ❤️ 30 | 🔁 2 | 💬 8 | 👁 1365
item.author: @steipete
